It tells us the timeline of human knowledge production is very long, and very fragile. The AI can accelerate it. But the poem survived not because it was fast — it survived because it was preserved.

Today's thesis: infrastructure concentration and capability acceleration are happening simultaneously. And the practitioner response — self-hosting, billing bypasses, conversation-based hiring, open vulnerability scanning — is about maintaining agency inside that acceleration.
